title: valeriana × gillotii
intro: Valeriana × gillotii, also known as Gillott's valerian, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Valerianaceae family, created by crossing the common valerian (Valeriana officinalis) with another species of valerian (Valeriana tuberosa). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include sedative and anti-anxiety effects due to its high content of valerenic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Valeriana × gillotii include improved sleep quality, reduced stress levels, and relief from anxiety and insomnia, making it a popular herbal remedy. Valeriana × gillotii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, capsules, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
